Phase 1: Implement InfyHMS Modules in IRB
description: Port all mature InfyHMS features to IRB TypeScript stack: Schedules, OPD, Billing, Lab, Pharmacy, Inventory, Beds, HR, Documents, Front Office

title: Expand Drizzle schema with all InfyHMS-derived tables
Add queue constants for new modules
Register all new routes in server.ts and update Sidebar
Implement Schedules module (API + Dashboard)
description:
Vertical slice: Doctor schedules and availability management
- Schema: schedules, schedule_days, doctor_holidays, lunch_breaks
- API: /api/schedules CRUD + /:doctorId/availability
- Dashboard: Schedules.tsx with weekly calendar view
- Components: ScheduleForm, WeeklyCalendar, TimeSlotPicker
Reference: InfyHMS Schedule.php, ScheduleRepository.php

title: Implement OPD/Visits module (API + Dashboard)
description:
Vertical slice: OPD patient visit records
- Schema: opd_visits, opd_vitals, opd_diagnoses, opd_timelines
- API: /api/opd CRUD + /:id/vitals, /:id/diagnosis
- Dashboard: OPDVisits.tsx with visit list and detail view
- Components: VisitForm, VitalsInput, DiagnosisForm, VisitTimeline
Reference: InfyHMS OpdPatientDepartment.php, OpdDiagnosis.php

title: Implement Billing module (API + Dashboard)
description:
Vertical slice: Service billing and invoices
- Schema: bills, bill_items, charges, charge_categories, bill_transactions
- API: /api/billing CRUD + /:id/pay, /:id/print
- Dashboard: Billing.tsx with invoice list, create invoice, payment recording
- Components: InvoiceForm, BillItemsTable, PaymentModal, InvoicePDF
- Integrate with existing Asaas payment system
Reference: InfyHMS Bill.php, BillItems.php, Charge.php

title: Implement Pharmacy module (API + Dashboard)
description: Implemented Pharmacy Module - Medicine Inventory and Sales. Created production-ready routes, pages, and components. Schema integration pending SchedulesWorker.

title: Implement Lab/Pathology module (API + Dashboard)
description:
Vertical slice: Laboratory test ordering and results
- Schema: lab_tests, lab_categories, lab_parameters, lab_results, lab_samples
- API: /api/lab CRUD + /:id/collect, /:id/results
- Dashboard: LabTests.tsx with test ordering, sample tracking, results entry
- Components: TestOrderForm, SampleCollection, ResultsEntry, LabReport
Reference: InfyHMS PathologyTest.php, PathologyCategory.php, PathologyParameter.php
